message:
fix(tests): isolate extension directories to prevent sibling discovery collision

Move throwing and good extension test fixtures into separate subdirectories
(extensions/throw-ext/ and extensions/good-ext/) to prevent
discover_related_extension_entries from finding both .mjs files in the
same directory. Without isolation, the good.mjs extension was discovered
and loaded during throw_spec processing, causing a tool name collision
when good_spec was subsequently loaded explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
